CarCapacity.description: The number of employees that a car can take

CarPollution.description: The pollution produced by a car

BusCapacity.description: The number of employees that a bus can take

BusPollution.description: The pollution produced by a bus

MinEmployeesToTransport.description: The minimum number of employees that need to be transported

MaxBuses.description: The maximum number of buses that can be used

notes: The source incorrectly encodes integer variables with `"shape": ["Integer"]`; we correct this to `"type": "integer"`.
The cutting plane (source variation `183_e`) is excluded because it is instance-specific.
Implicit non-negativity assumptions are added for every parameter.
